description: CompositionWhite shoes with synthetic upper, fabric sockliner and phylon soleshoe care1. Rub surface with soft, clean, damp cloth to remove dust2. Do not machine washThis pair of white Cameo from fila is an easy-to-wear footwear with a lace up front and a Nano PU synthetic upper coupled with stitching to create a unique look. The glossy strip over the heel grip makes it attractive, while the comfortable sockliner assures comfort and keeps the ankle safe from impact. The lightweight cushioned footbed keeps the foot relaxed even after strenuous fitness sessions. The rubber outsole with multi-directional grooves ensures excellent stability and grip, making it a great urban footwear.
